footer.description: The platform where verified lawyers and clients find each other.

common.error: Something went wrong, please try again

home.heroTitle: Find a trusted lawyer in Georgia
home.heroSubtitle: Verified case histories, transparent pricing, direct communication. LawMarket connects clients with professional lawyers.
home.trust1Text: Every published case is manually reviewed by our team — with a case number and supporting evidence.
home.trust2Text: Service prices are known upfront. Pick the service that fits your budget.
home.trust3Text: Message lawyers directly on the platform, book consultations, and pay securely.
home.expatText: A dedicated consultation program for foreigners — starting a business, residency, taxes. Applications reviewed within 48 hours.
home.how1Text: Filter lawyers by practice area, city and language.
home.how2Text: Review verified cases, services and prices.
home.how3Text: Message or book a consultation directly on the platform.

howItWorks.title: How LawMarket works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple and transparent process for both clients and lawyers.
howItWorks.client1Text: Filter lawyers by practice area, city and language. Browse their profiles and verified cases.
howItWorks.client2Text: Every public case has been verified by our team using its case number and evidence.
howItWorks.client3Text: Message a lawyer on the platform or book a service directly at a fixed price.
howItWorks.provider1Text: Sign up, complete your profile and list your services with prices.
howItWorks.provider2Text: Upload successful cases with a case number and proof. Only approved cases are published.
howItWorks.provider3Text: Receive messages and bookings. Optionally join the expat consultation program.
howItWorks.verificationText: A lawyer submits a case with its number, a public registry link and/or evidence, and, when needed, a client consent document. Our team reviews and approves or rejects it. Evidence and consent documents stay private — only the approved case summary is published.

expat.title: Expat Consultation Program
expat.subtitle: Legal help for setting up a business, residency and living in Georgia — in English.
expat.point1Text: Company registration, individual entrepreneur status, bank accounts.
expat.point3Text: Small business status with 1% tax, international taxation.
expat.how1: Fill in the application — tell us about your situation.
expat.how2: Our team reviews your application within 48 hours.
expat.how3: Once accepted, you pay and a call is scheduled with a matching lawyer.
